0.details:
To my bestfriend Precious thank you for being there for me and giving me a good lifetime. Buying me a phone shows how much you love and listens to me. Having you in my life means slot to me and i thank you for that.
I love you for being something close to my heart. I promise to be there always and forever. Again i prefer to be yours only and you know.
0.model_generation:
Dear Precious,

Thank you so much for always being there for me and for giving me a lifetime of joy and support. Your thoughtful gift of a new phone shows how deeply you care about me and how well you listen to my needs. Having you in my life means more to me than words can express. Your unwavering friendship has been a constant source of strength and happiness. I am grateful for every memory we’ve created together and every moment you stood by my side. You truly hold a special place in my heart. I cherish every laugh and conversation we’ve shared. I want you to know that I promise to always be there for you, through thick and thin, now and forever. My loyalty and love belong to you and only you. Looking forward to many more adventures together. I love you dearly.

Yours always,
0.final_version:
Thank you for being there and being my therapist in tough times. Without your presence i don't know what would have happened to my mental health.

I don't see the future without you and my past have been the best because of you. I wish you all the best in life and i would give you the best life ever my dear.

I enjoy sharing big moments with you,happy or sad i cherish it. Only God know about the future but i will pray for the best over and over. If it wasn't for distance i would've hugging you but I will soon.

I saw everything is going well at home,mom i mean our mom is there living her her late age nice. And again friend thank you so so much for being there for me without judging me and my personality sometimes is up too much.

1.details:
Dear Sekomota I was deeply saddened to hear about loss of your mother My heart goes out to you and your family during this incredibly sad time. Please know that you and your loved ones are in my thoughts and prayers. May the warmth of cherished memories,the support of those around you and the peace that comes with time bring you comfort and strength. If there's anything I can do to support you-weather its helping with errands,being a listening ear or anything else please don't hesitate to reach out .
Your heartfelt sympathy Phemelo
1.model_generation:
Dear Sekomota,

I was deeply saddened to hear about the passing of your mother. She was such a remarkable woman, always warm and kind to everyone she met, and her memory will live on in the hearts of all who knew her. Her kindness and warm humor touched everyone fortunate enough to know her, and I will always remember her gentle spirit. My heart goes out to you and your family during this incredibly difficult time.

Please know that you are in my thoughts and prayers. May the warmth of cherished memories sustain you, the love and support of those around you give you strength, and the peace that comes with time bring you comfort.

If there is anything I can do, whether it’s running errands, lending a listening ear or helping in any other way, please don’t hesitate to reach out. You have my heartfelt support today and always.

With deepest sympathy,  
Phemelo
1.final_version:
My heart is heavy with sorrow as I write to offer my deepest condolences on the loss of your mother. Your pain is something I can imagine,and I wish there were words that could ease the weight of your grieve. Though they may be gone from our sight,there are memory and legacy will leave on in our hearts. In this dark time it's hard to see a way forward but know that you are not alone. Friends and family surround you,holding you close in love and support. May their warmth of their presence,the comfort of shared memories and the peace that comes with time slowly begin to heal your heart.

If there's anything I can do weather it's helping with daily tasks or simply being there please reach out. You're in my thoughts and prayers and I hope you feel the love and support that surround you. With deepest sympathy Phemelo

2.details: I'm sitting down to write this letter to you with a mix of emotions. But most of all I'm feeding truly sorry for my part in what happened. I realized that my actions hurt you and for that I'm deeply regretting.
2.model_generation:
I’m sitting down to write this letter with a mix of emotions, but most of all I feel truly sorry for my part in what happened. I recognize that my actions hurt you deeply, and I take full responsibility for the pain I caused. Looking back, I realize I spoke without thinking and acted without considering your feelings. You deserved understanding and support, and instead I failed to show the respect and care you needed. Please know my regret is genuine and that I am committed to learning from this mistake. I value our relationship more than anything, and I will work hard to rebuild the trust I damaged. I promise to listen more carefully, communicate more thoughtfully, and treat you with the kindness you deserve. I hope we can move forward together. Thank you for reading this letter and giving me the chance to make things right.

Sincerely,
2.final_version:
I’m sitting down to write this letter with a mix of emotions, but most of all I feel truly sorry for my part in what happened. I recognize that my actions hurt you deeply, and I take full responsibility for the pain I caused. Looking back, I realize I spoke without thinking and acted without considering your feelings. You deserved understanding and support, and instead I failed to show the respect and care you needed. Please know my regret is genuine and that I am committed to learning from this mistake. I value our relationship more than anything, and I will work hard to rebuild the trust I damaged. I promise to listen more carefully, communicate more thoughtfully, and treat you with the kindness you deserve. I hope we can move forward together. Thank you for reading this letter and giving me the chance to make things right.

I value the laughter,adventures and memory we've shared and I don't want this to define our friendship. I am willing to do the work to rebuild trust and love forward.

3.details: Hey I just wanted to let you know that I am thinking of you and believe in you. Whatever challenges you're facing,know that you're stronger that you think and capable of overcoming them. Don't give up,you're doing better than you think and better that you did yesterday.
3.model_generation: Hey there! I just wanted to let you know I’ve been thinking about you and I truly believe in your strength. Whatever challenges you’re facing right now, remember that you’re more resilient than you realize and fully capable of overcoming any obstacle in your path. It’s okay to take things one step at a time—small victories add up, and each day you’re growing stronger. Don’t give up, because you’ve already come so far and you’re doing better than you might think. Even on the tough days, your efforts matter and are moving you forward. Be kind to yourself, celebrate progress, and know that every setback is a setup for a comeback. I’m here cheering you on, and I’m confident that with each new day, you’ll discover just how capable you are. I’m proud of you every single day. Trust yourself and remember how far you’ve come—your potential is limitless. Keep going—you’ve got this.
3.final_version:
Hey there! I just wanted to let you know I’ve been thinking about you and I truly believe in your strength. Whatever challenges you’re facing right now, remember that you’re more resilient than you realize and fully capable of overcoming any obstacle in your path. It’s okay to take things one step at a time—small victories add up, and each day you’re growing stronger. Don’t give up, because you’ve already come so far and you’re doing better than you might think. Even on the tough days, your efforts matter and are moving you forward. Be kind to yourself, celebrate progress, and know that every setback is a setup for a comeback. I’m here cheering you on, and I’m confident that with each new day, you’ll discover just how capable you are. I’m proud of you every single day. Trust yourself and remember how far you’ve come—your potential is limitless. Keep going—you’ve got this. You habe withing you the power to overcome any obstacle,to push through the darkness and to emerge stronger and more radiant than ever. You're worth and value come from who you are,not from what you do or what other think of you. 
Keep pushing forward.

4.details: My dear husband, today I promise to love you,cherish you,and stand by your side through all life's joy and challenges. I vow to support your dreams , to listen to your heart amd to be your rock in times of need. I promise to laugh with you , to cry with you and to build a life together.
4.model_generation: My dear husband, today I promise to love you with every fiber of my being. I vow to cherish you, stand by your side through life’s joys and challenges, and celebrate each triumph and comfort every sorrow. I will support your dreams as if they were my own, listen to your heart when words are unspoken, and be your steadfast rock in moments of doubt. I pledge to laugh with you in times of happiness, to wipe away your tears when sadness clouds your spirit, and to grow alongside you in faith and hope. Together we will build a home filled with kindness, understanding, and endless adventure. I promise to be patient, honest, and loyal, honoring the bond we share. I will celebrate your quirks, honor your strengths, and face every dawn and dusk with you by my side. Today and always, I choose you as my partner, my confidant, and my greatest love.
4.final_version:
My dear husband, today I promise to love you with every fiber of my being. I vow to cherish you, stand by your side through life’s joys and challenges, and celebrate each triumph and comfort every sorrow. I will support your dreams as if they were my own, listen to your heart when words are unspoken, and be your steadfast rock in moments of doubt. I pledge to laugh with you in times of happiness, to wipe away your tears when sadness clouds your spirit, and to grow alongside you in faith and hope. Together we will build a home filled with kindness, understanding, and endless adventure. I promise to be patient, honest, and loyal, honoring the bond we share. I will celebrate your quirks, honor your strengths, and face every dawn and dusk with you by my side. Today and always, I choose you as my partner, my confidant, and my greatest love.

I love you for who you are and for who you helped me to be. I love your strengths and your weaknesses,your quirks and your passios. I love our night conversations,our silly jokes and our deep meaningful talks,I choose you today and everyday to be my partner, my friend and my soulmate. I promise to love you, honor you now and forever more.

5.details: My dear friend, as I stand before you today,I'm overwhelmed with emotions and gratitude,you're my best friend any my everything. Today I promise to love you,cherish you and stand by your side.
5.model_generation: My dear friend, as I stand before you today, I am overwhelmed with emotions and gratitude. You are my best friend, my everything, and I feel so fortunate to share this moment with you. Through laughter and tears, you have been my rock, guiding me with unwavering support and love. Today I promise to love you with all my heart, to cherish every smile and comfort every tear. I vow to honor your dreams, to celebrate your victories, and to hold you close through every challenge. I pledge to listen with an open heart, to speak with kindness, and to always encourage your growth. I promise to stand by your side, offering strength when you feel weak and hope when dark days arise. Together, we will build a life filled with joy, adventure, and endless love. Today and always, you are my partner, my confidant, and my greatest blessing.
5.final_version:
My dear friend, as I stand before you today, I am overwhelmed with emotions and gratitude. You are my best friend, my everything, and I feel so fortunate to share this moment with you. Through laughter and tears, you have been my rock, guiding me with unwavering support and love. Today I promise to love you with all my heart, to cherish every smile and comfort every tear. I vow to honor your dreams, to celebrate your victories, and to hold you close through every challenge. I pledge to listen with an open heart, to speak with kindness, and to always encourage your growth. I promise to stand by your side, offering strength when you feel weak and hope when dark days arise. Together, we will build a life filled with joy, adventure, and endless love. Today and always, you are my partner, my confidant, and my greatest blessing.

I've loved watching you grow and evolve over the years and I am so proud of the person you've become. Your kindness,empathy and generosity inspire me everyday. Here's to anotjer year of adventures,late night calls and making memories together.

post_survey.feedback: This study taught a lot and I'm greatful for the opportunity given to me to be part of the study.
